mlb.headline: Tigers place reliever Brant Hurter on 15-day injured list
mlb.summary: The Tigers placed left-handed reliever Brant Hurter on the 15-day injured list with lumbar spine inflammation.

mlb.headline: MLB betting tips for Sunday: Back Goldschmidt, Grisham for hitters
mlb.summary: All of the odds, recommended prop bets and trends in baseball for Sunday, May 24.

nhl.headline: Everett Silvertips, WHL champions, take Memorial Cup opener
nhl.summary: Right wing Jesse Heslop scored a goal, and the Everett Silvertips, after winning the Western Hockey League championship, defeated the Chicoutimi Sagueneens 5-3 in Kelowna, British Columbia on Saturday

tennis.headline: French Open 2026: How to watch in the UK, schedule, prize money, Brit watch
tennis.summary: Find out all you need to know about the 2026 French Open in the UK, with dates, TV information, prize money and more.

tennis.headline: French Open prize money won't change this year, Mauresmo says
tennis.summary: The French Open will not adjust its prize money pool this year despite player complaints about their share of the major's revenue, tournament director Amelie Mauresmo said.
